Apple Inc.

Notice of Annual Meeting of Shareholders to be held on May 15, 2026.

Only shareholders of record at the close of business on the record date of March 20, 2026 are entitled to vote.

This proxy statement relates to the fiscal year ended 2025.

Matters to be Voted On

Proposal 1: Election of Directors

Proposal 2: Ratification of the Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm

Proposal No. 3 — Advisory Vote to Approve Executive Compensation

Proposal 4: Shareholder Proposal Regarding Political Contributions

Auditor

The Board has appointed our independent registered public accounting firm, Ernst & Young LLP, to audit the financial statements.

Summary Compensation Table

Tim Cook, CEOTotal Compensation$ 63,209,845
Luca Maestri, CFOTotal Compensation$ 27,180,000
